# SplashLens App

> Free-core, offline-first PWA field reference tool for pool service technicians. 500+ error codes, chemical dosing calculators, online AI equipment scanner (error codes, parts ID, test strips), SLAM multi-day tracker, filter guides, checklists, and route tracking. No account required. Manual tools work offline after first load; AI scanner requires internet.

## App URL

https://app.splashlens.com

## What This App Does

SplashLens is a Progressive Web App that pool service technicians use poolside to:
- Look up equipment error codes (Hayward, Pentair, Jandy, Maytronics/Dolphin, Polaris, Aiper, Raypak, IntelliFlo, AquaCal, Sta-Rite, Waterway, Beatbot, Betta â€” 13 brands, 500+ codes)
- Calculate chemical doses (FC, pH, alkalinity, calcium, CYA, salt, SLAM)
- Identify pool parts by camera using AI (PartSnap)
- Read test strips via AI camera scan
- Track multi-day SLAM treatments through OCLT completion
- Reference filter procedures (sand, DE, cartridge)
- Run opening, closing, weekly, and monthly service checklists
- Track route progress for the day

Manual lookup, calculators, guides, checklists, and route tools work offline after the first load. AI camera scanning requires internet.

## How the AI Scanner Works

Three camera modes:
1. Error Scan â€” aim at any equipment error display, AI reads the code and returns full diagnosis
2. PartSnap â€” aim at any pool part, AI identifies manufacturer, model, OEM part number, replacement notes
3. Test Strip â€” aim at a wet test strip, AI estimates FC/pH/TA/CH/CYA readings with range flags

Backend: Cloudflare Pages Function to Anthropic Claude Haiku vision. Error-code scanning can fall back to browser TextDetector or manual entry offline; PartSnap and test-strip analysis require internet.

## Marketing Site

Full feature overview, competitor comparison, blog (300+ articles): https://splashlens.com
